contributor_note: Seeded from common horticultural knowledge. Needs primary source verification.

habit.note: Sow October–November for overwintered crop. Autumn-sown plants stronger than spring.

notes: Hardy legume. Can be sown in autumn to overwinter and crop in early spring. Nitrogen-fixing. Watch for blackfly on shoot tips — pinch out to discourage. Pods, seeds and young shoots all edible.
